answer: Blood-Brain Barrier Failure biomarker panel is on the page because it is one of the few choices that changes what the engine does next.
evidence_chain: Phase 1 mapped the live mechanism lane as Blood Brain Barrier Failure.
Phase 2 connected that lane through BBB Permeability Increase To Peripheral Immune Infiltration.
Phase 3 says the downstream burden shows up as Microglial Chronic Activation, Neurovascular Uncoupling.
implication: Blood-Brain Barrier Failure biomarker panel will steer future machine runs and slates this way: Future slates use this panel as the default operator readout set.
recommended_follow_up: If you want the shortest route forward, use the recommended option on the card.
